mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment_order ( order_id, user_id, provider, out_trade_no, amount, currency, status, stripe_checkout_session_id, stripe_payment_intent_id, checkout_url, idempotency_key, expires_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{userId}, #{provider}, #{outTradeNo}, #{amount}, #{currency}, #{status}, #{stripeCheckoutSessionId}, #{stripePaymentIntentId}, #{checkoutUrl}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{expiresAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, user_id, provider, out_trade_no, amount, currency, status, stripe_checkout_session_id, stripe_payment_intent_id, checkout_url, idempotency_key, expires_at, created_at, updated_at FROM payment_order WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND provider = #{provider} AND status = 'WAIT_PAY' AND checkout_url IS NOT NULL AND expires_at > NOW() ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE payment_order SET status = #{status}, stripe_checkout_session_id = #{stripeCheckoutSessionId}, stripe_payment_intent_id = #{stripePaymentIntentId}, checkout_url = #{checkoutUrl}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, user_id, provider, out_trade_no, amount, currency, status, stripe_checkout_session_id, stripe_payment_intent_id, checkout_url, idempotency_key, expires_at, created_at, updated_at FROM payment_order WHERE stripe_payment_intent_id = #{stripePaymentIntentId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, order_id, user_id, provider, out_trade_no, amount, currency, status, stripe_checkout_session_id, stripe_payment_intent_id, checkout_url, idempotency_key, expires_at, created_at, updated_at FROM payment_order WHERE stripe_checkout_session_id = #{stripeCheckoutSessionId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE payment_order SET status = 'SUCCEEDED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status != 'SUCCEEDED'
UPDATE payment_order SET status = 'FAILED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('INIT', 'WAIT_PAY')
UPDATE payment_order SET status = 'EXPIRED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('INIT', 'WAIT_PAY')
